rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARTHA A. ALEXANDER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Court Approval Of Mediation Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing subject to revision of order as follows: copy of mediation agreement added to order; phrase "and adopts as its order" struck from item #1 as the court does not convert mediation agreements to orders; and item #2 struck as that term does not appear in the mediation agreement. If Counsel wishes to appear and contest the revisions to the order, he or she must contact this Examiner no later than 3:00 p.m. today, April 9, 2015.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NATIVIDAD RAMIREZ HERRERA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to May 11, 2015. Examiner asked for a supplemental declaration but an amended petition was filed. An amended petition requires the same notice, including publication as the petition it amends (CRC 7.53). New publication and notice are required. In addition, it is noted the amended petition also states bond is waived and waivers of bond are attached, but no waivers of bond are attached to the amended petition.
